titleStmt.title: SII 5.1003: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1003. (A.R. No. 138 of 1896). ON THE NORTH, WEST AND SOUTH WALLS OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ . pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyil ponnemiyaḷavum tanneminaṭappa viḷaṅku cayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkoparuvattu cakkarakkoṭṭattu vikkiramatoḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarn tu matuvaraiīṭṭa vayirākarattu vāri Ayilanu ḷavaracar tan=ta ḷa miriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittu toḷvali kāṭṭi porppari naṭātti kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭi teṉṟicai temarukamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniṭai naṉnilappāvai tanimaiyun tavirntu punitalat tirumaṇimakuṭa muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭit taṉṉaṭi yiraṇṭun taṭamuṭiyākat tonnila ventar cūṭa muṉṉai maṉuvāḷāka meṅkaṇu n=ta ṉātu tirunila veṇi (ṇi)lāt tikaḻa vorutani meruvil puli viḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟ tīvān=ta rattu pūpativaraiyarkaḷ tiṟai viṭutan=ta kalañcori kaḷiṟu muṟaimuṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya teṉṉavaṉ karun=ta lai parun=ta lai
ttiṭattaṉ poṉṉakaṟp puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa naṉmaṇi yāramu n=ti ruppuyat talaṅkalum poliya viramu n=ti yākamum viḷaṅkap pārmicai mevalar vaṇaṅka virasihāṁsana ttup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=ta ruḷiya kovirājakesaripatma rāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 10 5 Āvatu ḷ ṉūṟṟu Aṟupattaiñcu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu kaḷattūrkkoṭṭattut taniyūr śrīmadhurān=ta kaccaturvvedi maṅkalattup peruṅkuṟi sabhai yom Iṉṉāḷāl cempiyaṉmahāde vip perumaṇṭapattu Āsabāvṛddha r nirampap peruṅku turvedimaṅga lattup paḷḷi ceṅkeṇi cāttaṉ coḻaṉāṉa senāpatikaḷ vāṇarājar nammur Eṭuppitta tirukkaṟṟaḷi tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiya mahāde varkku havibali Arccanai kku Arccanābhoga ttukkum Uḷḷiṭṭuc ceyyaveṇṭum nivan=ta ṅkaḷukku nāṅkaḷ kuṭutta Ū
rāvatu Eṅkaḷūrt teṉpiṭākai viracoḻap pereri kiḻ Eṉṟattūr vaḷaiyiṟcuṟṟu kiḻpāṟ kellai śrīrājakesarivatikku meṟkkum teṉpāṟ kellai nālāyiravaṉukku vaṭakkum meṟpāṟ kellai śrīviranārāyaṇavatikkuk(kuk) kiḻakku Iraṇṭāñ catira(v) vitikkuk kiḻa(k)kkum vaṭapāṟ kellai A kaḷum coḻakulavāykkālūkku teṟku muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟukku teṟkkumāka Icain=ta Iṉṉāṉ kellaiyilu makappaṭṭa nilam Uṭumpoṭi yāmaitavaḻn=ta tu Epperppaṭṭitum puṟṟu n=te- ṟṟakāriyum māṟu māṟiṭu paṭukaiyum kuḷamum Oṭaiyum kollaiyum nirnilamum ṟum Uḷ nilam Oḻiviṉṟi mikitik kuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka Epperppaṭṭa nilamum cantrāditya vaṟ Iṟaiyiliyāvataṟku Iccāttaṉ viracoḻaṉāṉa vāṇarājar tan=ta Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu Iraṇṭāyiramum
sabhai yom sabhā viniyokan ttukkuk koṇṭu Ivviraṇṭāyiraṅ kācukku Ivveṉṟuttūr Eppoppaṭṭa Iṟaiyum veṭṭi muṭṭaiyāḷum koḷḷappeṟātomākavum Ivvūr piṭākai Opāti Iṟai Eṉṟum nirvilai Eṉṟum tavaṇaikkāṭi Eṉṟum nele Ittaṉ Eṉṟum Āyam (āyam) An=ta rāyameṉṟum Iṟaiyilikkācu Eṉṟum māviṟai yeṉṟum Uḷccevaka meṉṟum kāṇiveṭṭi Eṉṟum Ivaiccukkut talaimāṟu Ūrom Iṭṭu vum maṟṟu cilliṟai coṟumāṭṭu Uḷḷiṭṭa kuṭimai Epperppaṭṭaṉavu ḷāl vanta pūrvā cāramum krayadravya mum karadravya mum Ivarpakkal koṇṭa Ivviraṇṭāyiraṅkācum sabhai yom koṇṭu Ivveṉṟattū ruḷppaṭṭa Iṟaiyum Oḻin tu kuṭuttom śrīmaturān=ta kacca tu
rvvedi maṅkalattup peruṅkuṟi sabhai yom paṇikkap paṇiyāl paṇittār śrīmaturān=ta kacceri Irāyūrc coṭṭait tāmodi rabha ṭṭarum śrīmaturān=ta kacceri Ālakkoṉṟai tiruvākkra mavittarum śrīirumuṭicoḻacceri piṟān tu kra mavittarum ciṅkaḷān=ta kacceri Araṇaipuṟattu kovin=takra mavittarum viracoḻacceri mahāticai nārāṇabha ṭṭasarvakratuvājapeyāji yārum śrīkotaṇṭarāmacceri pāṭakattu yaññātvari soma yājiyārum śrīparakesaricceri vaṟṟalūr nārāyaṇabha ṭṭarum śrīrāja� ṇacceṭṭu vāmaṉasomayājiyārum cūracūḷāmaṇicceri komapuṟattu Akkāḷasahasra kunṟayasah(ā)sra num Itiripuvaṉam(ā)hāde vicceri naṟaiyūr Iṣikecavapaṭṭa soma yājiyār paṇikka paṇiyāl Ūṟkkaṇakkakan caṭaya Amaracuntara nāṉa brahma piriyanen Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku vaṟṟalūr tiruveṅkaṭa- bha ṭṭa somayāji Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku kāra mpicceṭṭu vāma ṉakkiramavittan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku sāhaṇai mātavakkiramavittan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku nammurk kāṭṭukkai nārāyaṇakkiramavittaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Āttiraiyan Udayadivāka rassarvā titta ppaṭikku kuñcappavil pūtiviṣṇubha ṭṭa soma[yāji*]yār Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku māyin=ta kkuṟa kovin=ta ṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkuk kārāmpicceṭṭuk kan=tā ṭaidakṣi- ṇā muttipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku su kumārabha ṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kārāmpicceṭṭu nārāyaṇakkiramivittaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Aruḷāḷakkiramivittaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku pippirai nārāyaṇabha ṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Digital edition of SII 5.1003 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
